provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, massive scarred human male in his 50s whose silhouette is unmistakable in the Reach, wearing an assemblage of the best stolen armor from every faction — a Veshan champion chest plate with the house crest ground off and his own mark burned in, Compact officer shoulder boards bolted to pauldrons, Keth-grown shin guards that look uncomfortable on human legs, a heavy fur-lined cloak taken from someone important, multiple weapons visible, the chaos of his gear is deliberate — every piece is a trophy and everyone knows it
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Sable Reach outlaw. Salvaged, stolen, and improvised gear. Nothing matches, nothing is new, everything tells a survival story.
